{{Quote|Starlog 3-24-1 from the bridge of the cruiser ''RS Revenge'', Captain Kazan reporting. We are awaiting the return of Captain Han Solo and his first mate, Chewbacca, who are long overdue on a delicate mission to acquire the mystical talisman which has been sought by our forces and by the Empire.|Captain Kazan|<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" />}}
The '''''RS Revenge''''' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]] during their [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|civil war]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" /> At some point between [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref><ref name="Leland Holiday">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=870#15778940|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-10-12|time=6:13 PM}}</ref> it was [[Captain/Legends|captained]] by a [[Gender/Legends|man]] named [[Kazan]] and stationed at an [[Ring Base|Alliance base]] that was hidden in an [[Unidentified asteroid field (Rebel Alliance base)|asteroid field]]. When the Rebel-allied [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] left the base to retrieve a mystical artifact known as the [[Talisman (artifact)|Talisman]], Kazan recorded a [[starlog]] journal entry about their [[Mission to Panna Prime|mission]] from the ''RS Revenge''{{'s}} [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]].<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" /> His entry, which mentioned the cruiser by name, was later used as narration for a [[Unidentified Rebel cartoon|cartoon]] created about the mission.<ref name="Holiday Special">''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The ''RS Revenge''{{'s}} only mention in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] is in ''[[The Story of the Faithful Wookiee]]'', a cartoon<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" /> written by [[George Lucas]] and produced by [[Nelvana]] Studios.<ref name="Tooning Out">{{SWArchive|url=movies/saga/20081210.html|text=Tooning Out the "Holiday Special": Nelvana Studios}}</ref> It first aired on television as part of [[1978]]'s ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''<ref name="Holiday Special" /> and was later included as an [[Easter egg (virtual)|Easter egg]] on the [[2011]] ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]'' [[Wikipedia:Blu-ray Disc|Blu-ray]] release.<ref name="blu-ray">''[[Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]''</ref> Captain Kazan and the ''RS Revenge'' were late additions to the cartoon;<ref name="Faithful Wookiee" /> neither are mentioned in the fourth draft of the ''Holiday Special''{{'s}} script.<ref name="script">{{WebCite|url=http://starwarsholidayspecial.com/text/script.htm|text=The Fourth Draft Script - 09/13/78|work=[[Starwarsholidayspecial.com|The Star Wars Holiday Special]]|archivedate=20101223071504}}</ref>
